title: Maa Tulsi Mantra
intro: Read the Tulsi Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Tulsi.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Shreem Hreem Kleem Aim Vrindavyai Swaha.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
the sacred Vrinda (Tulsi),
who is beloved
of Lord Vishnu
and the source
of all
divine energies.

faq.q1: When should Tulsi Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Tulsi Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or during Tulsi worship.
faq.q2: How many times should Tulsi Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Tulsi Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Tulsi Mantra is believed to bring purity, positive energy, spiritual growth, and the blessings of Goddess Tulsi.
faq.q4: Can Tulsi Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Tulsi Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Tulsi Mantra with faith and devotion.
